description.value: > Smoke Associated Domain: Fire. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the fire bolt power of the Fire domain. Cloud of Smoke (Su): As a standard action, you can create a 5-foot-radius cloud of smoke. This power has a range of 30 feet. Creatures inside the cloud take a â2 penalty on attack rolls and Perception skill checks for as long as they remain inside and for 1 round after exiting the cloud. Creatures inside the cloud gain concealment from attacks made by opponents that are not adjacent to them. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 2ndâ pyrotechnics, 3rdâ stinking cloud.
